description: A designed Department of Labor propaganda graphic. The top portion is a darkened photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark navy suit and red tie raising a clenched fist, standing in front of a blurred dark-green background with Marine One faintly visible at left. Beneath, a large white serif headline reads 'America FIRST!' ('America' in italic, 'FIRST!' in bold capitals). Below sits a white rounded text card topped by the Bloomberg logo, quoting a Bloomberg article about Project Firewall: 'No president has ever launched a program quite like Firewall, which the Labor Department said could be "the first time the federal government has sought to broadly enforce H-1B legal standards" in the program's 35-year history. Until now, suspected non-compliance has been largely based on worker complaints, investigated on a case-by-case basis. Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who will lead the project, said she will personally certify investigations, which will draw on data and resources from multiple agencies, including the Justice Department, US Citizenship and Immigration Services and others.' The visual style is a heroic political-poster montage with a defiant fist-raise pose plus an authoritative press quote-card. The propaganda technique is nationalist sloganeering ('America FIRST!') combined with authority-by-association (Bloomberg) to promote the H-1B-visa crackdown 'Project Firewall.' The target audience is the general public and American workers, framing visa enforcement as protecting American jobs.
notable_text: America FIRST! | Bloomberg: No president has ever launched a program quite like Firewall... 'the first time the federal government has sought to broadly enforce H-1B legal standards'... Labor Secretary Lori Chavez-DeRemer, who will lead the project, said she will personally certify investigations...
